positive: Minimalist geometric woodland creature silhouette, a stylized fox and owl composition, rendered with clean, bold lines and contrasting solid colors (deep teal, burnt orange, slate grey). The composition should be centered, designed for a single apparel repeat print. Focus on negative space and crisp edges. Highly vector-like, high contrast, graphic design style, symmetrical balance, flat lay illustration, perfect symmetry.
